title: limnanthes alba
intro: Limnanthes alba, also known as the white meadowfoam, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains a high concentration of limnanthin, a fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Limnanthes alba include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Limnanthes alba can be found in creams, salves, and oils, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
